# Semantic Core Contract

## Cluster Fields

- `cluster_id`
- `cluster_name`
- `intent`: informational, commercial, transactional, navigational, mixed
- `priority`: P0-P3
- `canonical_url_candidate`
- `page_type`
- `keywords`
- `evidence`
- `confidence`
- `notes`

## Conflict Types

- cannibalization;
- mixed intent;
- missing business proof;
- public-site SEO conflict with UX clarity;
- local/project facts missing.

## Done Criteria

- Every cluster has provenance.
- Every proposed page has a reason.
- Conflicts are explicit and can be routed to council when needed.
